findings.description: `RecordTypeBindingHandler` appears as a hint but this exact Java class name is not present in the source. The source only says "RecordTypeBindingハンドラ" (a descriptive phrase), which does not establish the class name.
findings.source_evidence: Source text: "RecordTypeBindingハンドラにより、入力レコードのレコードタイプに応じてメソッドが呼び分けられる"

findings.description: `BatchAction` appears as a hint but the source never uses this Java class name. The source only uses the Japanese term "バッチアクション" (general concept), not a class named `BatchAction`.
findings.source_evidence: Source text: "バッチアクションでインスタンス変数を使用する場合、以下の制約が生じる。"

findings.description: `FileLayoutValidatorAction` is missing from s4 hints despite being the concrete class returned by `getValidatorAction()` and appearing explicitly in the s4 code block.
findings.source_evidence: Source code: "return new FileLayoutValidatorAction();" and knowledge file s4 code block reproduces this.
